source.description: A reviewed six-panel graphite-and-colored-pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent hanging wind-chime set with a round wooden cap, exactly four metal tubes, central clapper, and diamond-shaped sail on warm off-white paper. The first three-tube generation is retained privately as rejected v1; the approved sheet keeps four separated tubes from construction through finish. No porch, tree, window, lettering, bird, decorative border, or extra ornament.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one hanging loop, cap ellipse, center cord, four staggered tube axes, clapper position, and lower sail footprint; wraps those guides with the cap, strings, and four tubes; adds the clapper, diamond sail, tube openings, hanging hardware, breeze marks, highlights, and shadow; then shades and colors only those established forms before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: hanging loop, cap ellipse, center cord, four staggered tube axes, clapper position, and diamond-sail footprint
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one vertical wind-chime arrangement with four separated hanging tubes and a centered lower sail.

final_elements.name: round wooden cap, four hanging strings, exactly four hollow metal tubes, and central cord
final_elements.description: A clean silhouette turns the guides into a readable wind chime with four tubes at alternating lengths.

final_elements.name: round clapper disk, diamond-shaped wind sail, four lower tube openings, and small hanging knots
final_elements.description: The sound-making center and hanging hardware complete the chime structure beneath the cap.

final_elements.name: tube reflection lines, wooden-cap grain, three breeze arcs, and faint cast shadow
final_elements.description: A few material lines, exactly three breeze arcs, and a light shadow clarify metal, wood, and movement without adding scenery.

final_elements.name: graphite depth with cool-gray metal, warm ochre wood, and muted teal sail color
final_elements.description: Restrained pencil color separates the established cap, tubes, clapper, sail, strings, reflections, and shadow while leaving paper highlights.

frames.visible_job: Places the hanging loop, cap ellipse, center cord, four staggered tube axes, clapper position, and diamond-sail footprint at one fixed scale.
introduces: hanging loop, cap ellipse, center cord, four staggered tube axes, clapper position, and diamond-sail footprint

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the round wooden cap, four hanging strings, exactly four hollow metal tubes at staggered lengths, and the central cord.
introduces: round wooden cap, four hanging strings, exactly four hollow metal tubes, and central cord
requires_prior_elements: hanging loop, cap ellipse, center cord, four staggered tube axes, clapper position, and diamond-sail footprint

frames.visible_job: Adds the round clapper disk, diamond-shaped wind sail, four lower tube openings, and small hanging knots to the established strings and tubes.
introduces: round clapper disk, diamond-shaped wind sail, four lower tube openings, and small hanging knots
requires_prior_elements: round wooden cap, four hanging strings, exactly four hollow metal tubes, and central cord

frames.visible_job: Adds long reflection lines to all four tubes, restrained grain to the cap, exactly three breeze arcs, and one faint cast shadow behind the completed chime.
introduces: tube reflection lines, wooden-cap grain, three breeze arcs, and faint cast shadow
requires_prior_elements: round wooden cap, four hanging strings, exactly four hollow metal tubes, and central cord
round clapper disk, diamond-shaped wind sail, four lower tube openings, and small hanging knots

frames.visible_job: Adds cool-gray pencil to the tubes and clapper, warm ochre to the cap, muted teal to the sail, and soft graphite to the established strings and shadow.
introduces: graphite depth with cool-gray metal, warm ochre wood, and muted teal sail color
requires_prior_elements: round wooden cap, four hanging strings, exactly four hollow metal tubes, and central cord
round clapper disk, diamond-shaped wind sail, four lower tube openings, and small hanging knots
tube reflection lines, wooden-cap grain, three breeze arcs, and faint cast shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established loop, cap, four strings and tubes, clapper, sail, knots, reflections, breeze arcs, restrained color, and shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight clarification on established metal tubes and wooden cap

rejection_checks: No loop, cap, string, tube, opening, clapper, sail, knot, reflection, breeze arc, color area, highlight, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The wind chimes must retain one vertical arrangement, exact four-tube count, tube spacing, cap width, clapper position, sail position, scale, and crop across all six panels.
Reserve the cap and clapper footprints from step one; do not draw finished cord or tube detail beneath those covering forms.
Reject porches, trees, windows, birds, hands, lettering, bells, extra ornaments, extra tubes, decorative borders, or scene clutter.
The finish must read as an attainable graphite-and-colored-pencil object study, not polished product art, a vector icon, or glossy metal rendering.
